title: 10 best herbal tinctures for dandruff
description: Plantain tinctures helps with dandruff because of its anti-inflammatory and antifungal properties. The plant's extract has been shown to soothe itchy scalps and reduce redness, calming irritated skin and flakes caused by dandruff. Additionally, the tincture's antimicrobial compounds help combat fungal infections that contribute to dandruff, promoting a healthy scalp environment and reducing flaking and itching.
